improvement_bullets: Developed predictive models for customer churn and sales forecasting using Python (scikit-learn), improving accuracy in identifying high-value segments by 15%.
Designed and executed A/B testing frameworks to validate marketing campaign effectiveness, leveraging data-driven experimentation to optimize user acquisition strategies.
Integrated Google Workspace Studio and NotebookLM to synthesize complex marketing intelligence, centralizing research documentation and automating internal knowledge-sharing workflows.
Engineered feature sets and performed exploratory data analysis to support machine learning initiatives, utilizing Python libraries to prepare robust datasets for predictive modeling.

Automated cross-functional data reporting by building custom Google Apps Script solutions to sync marketing datasets across Google Sheets and internal databases, reducing manual data-entry time by 20%.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Scientist opportunity with Canon USA. I am interested in this opportunity because of Canon’s Kyosei philosophy, which aligns perfectly with my professional commitment to using data to drive ethical, long-term business value. What interests me about working for Canon USA is its reputation as a global digital imaging leader that fosters innovation while maintaining a deep sense of community responsibility; this commitment to both quality and people intrigues me because I believe modern data science should be used to enrich, not just optimize, customer experiences. I believe my proficiency in building end-to-end data pipelines and my ability to translate technical model outputs into actionable business strategy would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems as a bridge between raw technical data and executive decision-making. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I designed an automated data architecture that integrated complex lead generation streams; this initiative allowed me to implement predictive modeling to identify high-value customer segments, ultimately contributing to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Data Scientist role at Canon USA would allow me to bring my experience in Python, SQL, and data visualization to your marketing and sales business units. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my machine learning and experimentation skills. During this time, I analyzed a 250K+ row dataset to provide actionable recommendations for city safety initiatives, utilizing rigorous cleaning and statistical analysis to ensure reliable insights. This project taught me the importance of data governance and quality assurance in high-stakes environments. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in automation and cloud-based data tools to assist in building predictive models and AI-driven solutions at Canon USA. I know that my technical versatility and analytical rigor align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Scientist role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
